raw_log_normalization: pulled via `rtk proxy gh run view --job <id> --log` and stripped the leading <job>\t<step>\t prefix per line.
notes: C++ template instantiation compile error in pandas's perf branch. The author added explicit instantiations `accumulate_moments_simd::operator()<xsimd::neon64>(...)` (Dockerfile-style: line 14 of moments_inst_neon.cpp, declared at moments_simd.hpp:255), but the template was defined for `xsimd::neon`, not `xsimd::neon64` (candidate at moments_simd.hpp:182 uses `xsimd::neon`). clang++ rejects with `error: explicit instantiation of 'operator()' does not refer to a function template`. Two compile units fail with the same root cause (moments_inst_neon.cpp.o + moments.cpp.o). meson+ninja stops the build, pip metadata-generation fails. macOS-15 / arm64 / Python 3.12. Selected as Batch 2 case 5 (deviation: compile_error rather than originally-targeted timeout/OOM, which has been hard to surface via run-list browsing). Fills v1.3 compile_error mass (was 1/16 → 2 in v2). Note: split=v2/holdout brings holdout to 5/4, slightly over-target — this case doesn't fit v2/stress's 'deliberately difficult' bucket, and v2/stress remains intentionally empty for future cases that probe known weaknesses (huge logs, scattered/multi-failure, unusual format).
